theme.hero_task: Pick the last strawberries of the season

tasks.action: Pick the last strawberries from Bed A

prompt.en: These might be the last strawberries! Enjoy every one -- they'll be back next year.
prompt.da: Det her er maaske de sidste jordbaer! Nyd hver en -- de kommer igen naeste aar.

tasks.action: Harvest remaining tomatoes and peppers from Bed C

prompt.en: Pick everything that's ripe or nearly ripe -- green ones ripen inside!
prompt.da: Pluk alt der er modent eller naesten modent -- groenne modner indenfoer!

prompt.en: Raspberries are slowing down but still some left!
prompt.da: Hindbaererne saaetner farten, men der er stadig nogle tilbage!

tasks.action: Water beds only if dry -- less frequent watering now

prompt.en: Check the soil -- only water if it feels dry to your finger.
prompt.da: Tjek jorden -- vand kun hvis den foeles toer for din finger.

tasks.action: Trim dead nasturtium and calendula stems

prompt.en: Flowers are finishing -- trim the dead parts to keep beds tidy.
prompt.da: Blomsterne er ved at vaere faerdige -- trim de doede dele for at holde bedene paene.

growth_events.event: Last everbearing strawberries ripening -- season ending

prompt.en: The strawberry season is ending -- say thank you to the plants for all the berries!
prompt.da: Jordbaersaesonen slutter -- sig tak til planterne for alle baerrene!

prompt.en: The raspberry canes are getting tired -- a few more weeks of berries left.
prompt.da: Hindbaerbusten bliver traet -- faa uger mere med baer.
